query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS studyGuides (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, courseId INT NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description TEXT, content TEXT, filePath VARCHAR(255), fileSize INT, createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (courseId) REFERENCES courses(id));
